# services.consul-template

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.consul-template`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.consul-template.instances` | `attribute set of (submodule)` | Attribute set of consul-template instances. Creates independent `consul-template-${name}.service` systemd units for each instance defined here. |
| `services.consul-template.instances.<name>.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable this consul-template instance. |
| `services.consul-template.instances.<name>.group` | `string` | Group under which this instance runs. |
| `services.consul-template.instances.<name>.package` | `package` | The consul-template package to use. |
| `services.consul-template.instances.<name>.settings` | `open submodule of (JSON value)` | Free-form settings written directly to the {file}`config.json` file. Refer to <https://github.com/hashicorp/consul-template/blob/main/docs/configuration.md#configuration-file> for supported values. ::: {.note} Resulting format is JSON not HCL. Refer to <https://www.hcl2json.com/> if you are unsure how to convert HCL options to JSON. ::: |
| `services.consul-template.instances.<name>.settings.pid_file` | `string` | Path to use for the pid file. |
| `services.consul-template.instances.<name>.user` | `string` | User under which this instance runs. |
